regulationsPage.rulesAttention: Please read the following rules carefully!
regulationsPage.followRules: All visitors to the cinema area are required to follow the house rules.
regulationsPage.ticketInfo: Tickets can be purchased at the cinema box office or online.
regulationsPage.enterRestriction: After the films have started, entry into the room is limited.
regulationsPage.noSmoke: Smoking is prohibited in the cinema area.
regulationsPage.turnOffPhones: Please turn off or mute mobile phones during the screening.
regulationsPage.exitAttention: We draw your attention to the proper use of exits and emergency exits.
regulationsPage.cleanSurrounding: Please keep your own seat and surroundings clean.
regulationsPage.leftoverArea: Place food and drink leftovers in the designated area.
regulationsPage.disinfectionPoint: Disinfection points are available in the cinema area.
regulationsPage.ticketDate: Tickets are only valid for the date indicated during purchase.
regulationsPage.returnInfo: Refunds are only possible under the conditions set out in the cinema's policies.
regulationsPage.onlinePurchase: When purchasing online, tickets can be presented on a mobile phone or in printed form.
regulationsPage.contactUs: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us!

dataFishingPage.dataFishingSubtitle: Only buy tickets on our official website and protect your data!
dataFishingPage.onlyOfficial: Only buy tickets on the official cinema website or at the box office.
dataFishingPage.neverShareData: Never enter your password or bank card details on an unknown website.
dataFishingPage.checkUrl: Pay attention to the website URL, only the official CosmoScreen domain is safe.
dataFishingPage.suspiciousEmail: If you receive a suspicious email, do not click on any links, but contact us instead.

aboutUsPage.aboutUsSubtitle: The cinema experience in digital form
aboutUsPage.storyOne: This website started as an exam paper, but during the design process it became clear to us that we wanted to create more than that. We envisioned an interface that would capture the atmosphere of the cinema: the excitement, the anticipation, and the experience of being captivated by a story.
aboutUsPage.storyTwo: We were inspired by the world of modern movie theaters. The dark tones, clean visuals, and simple navigation all serve the purpose of making the user feel at home in this cinematic environment from the very first moment.
aboutUsPage.storyThree: For us, this project is about learning, creative solutions, and continuous improvement. We wanted to create a foundation that could later be developed into a real, working service.
aboutUsPage.goalText: Creating a digital interface that recreates the atmosphere of the cinema, providing excitement and experience for every visitor.
aboutUsPage.motivationText: We draw inspiration from the world of modern movie theaters, creativity, and the joy of continuous learning to make the user experience unique.
aboutUsPage.visionText: We believe that details matter. Usability, aesthetics, and providing the visitor with not only information but also an atmosphere are important.
aboutUsPage.finalText: This exam is a milestone: both a learning process and the beginning of a possible future. We are open to new ideas, development, and building on this foundation.
